source: #### Setup Config Parameters

from pyspark.sql import Window
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, row_number, when, sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace

# Environment Parameter
env = 'prod'

# Config for updating keys in Bronze
bronze_tables_config = [
    {
        "table_detail": "esg_sharepoint_bronze.fuelcard_facility_map",
        "table_detail_bkup": "esg_sharepoint_bronze.fuelcard_facility_map_bkup",
        "table_name": "fuelcard_facility_map",
        "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/fuelcard_facility_map",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/fuelcard_facility_map_bkup",
        "format": "delta",
        "hash_columns": ["FuelCardNumber",regexp_replace("ValidFromDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), regexp_replace("ValidToDate", "-|[/.:]", "")],
        "old_hash_column": "HashKey",
        "drop_old_hashkey": "OLD_HashKey"
    }
]

# Config for Silver Backup
silver_tables_config = [
    {
        "table_detail": "silver.fuel_transactions",
        "table_detail_bkup": "silver.fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "table_name": "fuel_transactions",
        "path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fuel_transactions/fuel_transactions",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fuel_transactions_bkup/fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "format": "delta"
    }
#### Create Backup Tables (Frozen Cells)

#Create backups (bronze)
for config in bronze_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    print(f"Backup created for: {config['table_name']}")

#Create backups (silver)
for config in silver_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    print(f"Backup created for: {config['table_name']}")
#### Restore From Backup Tables (Frozen Cells)

#Restore backups (bronze)
for config in bronze_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail"])
    print(f"Backup restored for: {config['table_name']}")

#Restore backups (silver)
for config in silver_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail"])
    print(f"Backup restored for: {config['table_name']}")
#### Validation Queries - Before Updates

#FuelCardFacilityMap
validation_query = """
SELECT * FROM esg_sharepoint_bronze.fuelcard_facility_map
where fuelcardnumber = '34091'

"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
display(validation_df)

# BP Validation
# Standardising Product names 
df_product = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT 
                            ref.Description AS Product, 
                            ref.NumericValue AS FuelType
                        FROM esg_sharepoint_bronze.reference_data ref
                        WHERE ref.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 AND Dataset = 'ProductType'
                    """)
#display(df_product)
df_product.createOrReplaceTempView("TempProduct")

validation_query = """
SELECT  
    bp.TransactionReceiptNumber AS TransactionId, 
    bp.TransactionEffectiveDate AS TransactionEffectiveDate,
    f.Facility AS SiteCode,
    bp.Product AS Product,
    CASE WHEN t.FuelType = '1' THEN "Unleaded Petrol" ELSE "Diesel" END AS StandardisedProduct, 
    bp.Litres AS Quantity,
    'bp_fuel_transactions' AS RecordSourceTableName, 
    bp.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey,
    false as FileOverrideFlag,
    '' as Stationary_category
FROM bp_bronze.bp_fuel_transactions bp
LEFT JOIN esg_sharepoint_bronze.fuelcard_facility_map f ON f.FuelCardNumber = bp.CardNumber
LEFT JOIN TempProduct t ON t.Product = bp.Product
WHERE bp.Product IN (t.Product) AND bp.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 and bp.CardNumber = '34091'
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
display(validation_df)

# Silver Counts
validation_query = """
SELECT count(transactionid), SiteCode FROM silver.fuel_transactions
where recordsourcetablename = 'bp_fuel_transactions' and cdccurrentflag = 1
group by SiteCode
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
display(validation_df)
#### Drop Bronze Tables

file_path = f'abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/fuelcard_facility_map'
mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True) 
mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE esg_sharepoint_bronze.fuelcard_facility_map;""")
#### Drop Silver Tables

file_path = f'abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fuel_transactions/fuel_transactions'
mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True) 
mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE silver.fuel_transactions;""")
#### Drop Gold Tables

file_path = f'abfss://gold@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fact_fuel_consumption/fact_fuel_consumption'
mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True)
mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE gold.fact_fuel_consumption;"""
#### Validation Queries - After Updates

#FuelCardFacilityMap
validation_query = """
SELECT * FROM esg_sharepoint_bronze.fuelcard_facility_map
where fuelcardnumber = '34091'

"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
display(validation_df)

spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "LEGACY")
# BP Validation
# Standardising Product names 
df_product = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT 
                            ref.Description AS Product, 
                            ref.NumericValue AS FuelType
                        FROM esg_sharepoint_bronze.reference_data ref
                        WHERE ref.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 AND Dataset = 'ProductType'
                    """)
#display(df_product)
df_product.createOrReplaceTempView("TempProduct")

validation_query = """
SELECT distinct
    bp.TransactionReceiptNumber AS TransactionId, 
    bp.TransactionEffectiveDate AS TransactionEffectiveDate,
    f.Facility AS SiteCode,
    bp.Product AS Product,
    CASE WHEN t.FuelType = '1' THEN "Unleaded Petrol" ELSE "Diesel" END AS StandardisedProduct, 
    bp.Litres AS Quantity,
    'bp_fuel_transactions' AS RecordSourceTableName, 
    bp.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey,
    false as FileOverrideFlag,
    '' as Stationary_category
FROM bp_bronze.bp_fuel_transactions bp
LEFT JOIN esg_sharepoint_bronze.fuelcard_facility_map f ON f.FuelCardNumber = bp.CardNumber AND f.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 
LEFT JOIN TempProduct t ON t.Product = bp.Product 
WHERE bp.Product IN (t.Product) AND bp.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 and bp.CardNumber = '34091'       
and (to_date(bp.TransactionEffectiveDate,'dd/MM/yyyy') BETWEEN to_date(f.ValidFromDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_date(f.ValidToDate,'yyyy-MM-dd'))
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
display(validation_df)

# Silver Counts
validation_query = """
SELECT count(transactionid), SiteCode FROM silver.fuel_transactions
where recordsourcetablename = 'bp_fuel_transactions' and cdccurrentflag = 1
group by SiteCode
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
display(validation_df)
